pi_items.source: Web search confirms .flipchart is the official file extension for ActivInspire flipcharts published by Promethean
env.json defines 'ga' user account with Documents directory; standard document storage path
Combination of verified filename and directory components
Task description explicitly specifies 3-page structure: Page 1 (Title), Page 2 (Model), Page 3 (Practice). Hamburger paragraph methodology requires these three components.

Web search confirms 'Hamburger Paragraph' is the official name of the elementary writing teaching methodology used widely in education (found on We Are Teachers, Elementary Island, Reading Rockets, TPT, and Teach Starter)
Web search confirms 'Topic Sentence' is the standard term for the 'top bun' in hamburger paragraph methodology - the opening statement of the paragraph
Web search confirms hamburger paragraph uses supporting details (typically 3) as the 'fillings'. Task explicitly calls for three detail sentences matching this standard structure.
Web search confirms hamburger paragraph uses a concluding sentence as the 'bottom bun' that restates the topic
Task description specifies 'Page 3 — Practice Area: Title 'My Paragraph' and use the Connector/Line tool...' This is a reasonable practice section title
Task description specifies exactly 5 shapes needed: 'Stack shapes vertically to represent: Top Bun (Shape), Filling 1 (Shape), Filling 2 (Shape), Filling 3 (Shape), Bottom Bun (Shape)' = 5 shapes
Task description specifies: 'use the Connector/Line tool to draw at least 3 horizontal lines for students to write on'

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a synthetic educational template (not based on external data). ActivInspire is Promethean's real educational software for interactive whiteboards using the .flipchart file format. The hamburger paragraph is a verified elementary writing teaching methodology where topic sentence and conclusion serve as 'buns' with three supporting detail 'fillings'. The task specifications are accurate: 3-page structure with 5 shapes (burger) and 3 writing lines on the practice page. All required text elements align with the official hamburger paragraph framework.
